verdict: Diptyque Baies prioritizes fragrance artistry over ingredient innovation, featuring synthetic aromatic molecules alongside standard moisturizers. While beloved for scent, the skincare benefits are secondary to its perfumery positioning.

_research.name: Diptyque Baies Body Lotion
pros: Iconic fragrance profile highly praised by customers
Consistent quality across large customer base
_research.con: Fragrance-forward formulation means skincare ingredients are relatively standard and not particularly innovative.
